page_metadata.biotools__summary: The Transport Systems Tracker (TranSyT) is a tool to identify transport systems and the compounds carried across membranes, based on the annotations of the Transporter Classification Database (TCDB).
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: The Transport Systems Tracker (TranSyT) is a tool to identify transport systems and the compounds carried across membranes, based on the annotations of the Transporter Classification Database (TCDB).
